concerns.text: Phase 7 (T043-T047) implements pole figure validation and lattice symmetry checks. The spec.md contains no Functional Requirement (FR) or Success Criterion (SC) mandating pole figure generation or this specific validation. These tasks address a 'simulated review' not present in the current spec, creating unapproved scope creep. A task exists for an FR/SC that does not exist.

Task T033 instructs sweeping 'a range of low to moderate values' for interpolation tolerance. Spec FR-007 and SC-004 explicitly mandate sweeping the specific set {0.01, 0.05, 0.1}. The task description lacks these specific values, meaning the task as written does not guarantee the implementation of the required FR-007 logic.

Task T011b prioritizes 'synthetic generation' with specific reduction levels. Spec FR-001 and US-1 explicitly require downloading data from 'Materials Project and MTData repositories'. While T011 mentions a fallback, T011b's focus on synthetic data generation as a primary task for US-1 risks deprioritizing the mandatory repository ingestion requirement defined in the spec.
